summary: Implemented temperature badge wiring to route option cards

changes.models/saved-routes.ts: Added TemperatureSummary type, TEMPERATURE_SUMMARY constants, temperature overlay validators, and getWorstTemperatureLevel/getMaxTemperatureFahrenheit utilities
changes.types/routes.ts: Added TemperatureSummary export and temperatureSummary/maxTemperatureF to PlannedRouteOptionView.overlaysPreview
changes.components/planning/route-option-card.ts: Added TemperatureBadge import and display in weather row alongside Wind and Rain badges
changes.convex/actions/agent/graphs/planningGrap: Added temperatureSummary computation from overlay data and inclusion in overlaysPreview output

acceptance_criteria: Route with comfortable temps (65-75F) displays 'Mild' with green styling
Temperature values available shows actual high temp (e.g., '85F') not just level
No temperature overlay data displays 'Unknown' with muted styling
Extreme cold (<40F) or hot (>90F) displays correct extreme level with appropriate color

test_results.details: 62 tests passed. Route-option-card tests passed. Pre-existing planRide.test.ts failure is unrelated.

notes: Temperature thresholds: cold < 5°C, mild 5-20°C, warm 20-30°C, hot >= 30°C
Temperature displays in Fahrenheit for US locale
Follows extensible enum pattern from wind-badge.tsx for forward compatibility
Lint errors are pre-existing configuration issues (react-native plugin)
